subcodes.first_line: O scion of the martyr! Be thou neither sorrowful nor dismayed. Praise be to God, thou art the blessed offspring of that peerless soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیل شهید محزون مباش مغموم مگرد الحمد لله نجل سعید آن شخص فریدی و مشمول
subcodes.subjects: @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @consolation and comfort, @useful occupation; acquisition of a craft; trade; profession
